content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement governing the inspection of the stockholder list
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_14_nda_13

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types that capture the domain objects described in the agreement
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party = {
    name: string,                # e.g. "Patriot Scientific Corporation" or "Stockholder"
    is_company: bool,            # true for the Company, false for the Stockholder
    is_stockholder: bool         # true for the Stockholder, false for the Company
}

type ConfidentialMaterial = {
    description: string,                     # e.g. "stockholder list and related analyses"
    disclosed: bool,                          # true when the material has been disclosed
    required_by_legal_process: bool,         # true when a subpoena / interrogatory etc. forces disclosure
    notice_given: bool,                       # true when the Stockholder has given the Company prompt notice
    used_for_other_purposes: bool             # true when the material is used for a purpose not reasonably related to stockholder interests
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – the public model objects that can be aligned with other standards
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity company: Party
entity stockholder: Party
entity confidential_material: ConfidentialMaterial

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions (pure, no side‑effects)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_company(p: Party) -> bool: p.is_company
func is_stockholder(p: Party) -> bool: p.is_stockholder

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Deontic rules – obligations (O), prohibitions (F) and permissions (P)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – material may be used only for purposes reasonably related to the stockholder’s interests
rule F use_confidential_material_for_other_purposes:
    confidential_material.used_for_other_purposes always

@ Clause 2 – the Stockholder must not disclose the Confidential Material except as permitted
rule F disclose_confidential_material_without_legal_process:
    not confidential_material.required_by_legal_process and confidential_material.disclosed always

@ Clause 3 – when disclosure is required by law, the Stockholder must give prompt notice to the Company
rule O give_prompt_notice_on_legal_disclosure:
    confidential_material.required_by_legal_process implies confidential_material.notice_given always

@ Clause 3 – when disclosure is required by law, the Stockholder may disclose only the material that is legally required
rule O disclose_only_legally_required_material:
    confidential_material.required_by_legal_process implies confidential_material.disclosed always

@ Clause 4 – jurisdiction and venue
rule O accept_delaware_chancery_jurisdiction:
    true always

@ Clause 5 – remedies (specific performance / injunctive relief) – modeled as an obligation to seek them when a breach occurs
rule O seek_irreparable_harm_remedy_on_breach:
    true always   # the existence of the remedy is an obligation of the Company; no further state needed

@ Clause 6 – amendment / waiver must be in writing and signed
rule O amendment_must_be_written_and_signed:
    true always

@ Clause 7 – binding effect on successors and assigns
rule O binding_on_successors_and_assigns:
    true always

@ Clause 8 – governing law
rule O governed_by_delaware_law:
    true always

@ Clause 9 – execution in counterparts
rule O execution_in_multiple_counterparts:
    true always

@ Clause 10 – entire agreement
rule O entire_agreement_clause:
    true always

@ Clause 11 – no adverse inference of authorship
rule O no_authorship_adverse_inference:
    true always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Permission derived from the hypothesis (not prohibited by the agreement)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis – the Receiving Party may acquire information similar to Confidential Material from a third party
rule P acquire_similar_information_from_third_party:
    true always
```
